_comment: org.matrix.msc4143.rtc_foci lets MatrixRTC clients discover the LiveKit SFU. NOTE (foxhound VPS): Synapse served an EMPTY body for /.well-known/matrix/client, so this JSON is served as a static Caddy block — `handle /.well-known/matrix/client { respond "<this json>" 200 }` placed BEFORE `reverse_proxy /_matrix/*` in the matrix.foxhound.run site — rather than via Synapse extra_well_known_client_content.
